---
title: "C. Identity — OrgTree (MOD_\\*)"
subtitle: "OrgPath, dynamic groups, Administrative Units, delegation, migration runbook"
doc-type: subcategory-landing
pillar: modernization
sub-category: C
status: scaffold
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# C. Identity — OrgTree (MOD_\*) {.unnumbered}

The governance replacement for Active Directory's x.500 OU tree. OrgPath
encodes hierarchy in a user attribute; dynamic groups materialise every
subtree; Administrative Units scope delegation; the drift engine enforces.

Full canon lives at [src/uiao/modernization/orgtree/](../../../modernization/orgtree.html).
This sub-category is the customer-facing entry point for the 28 MOD_*
artifacts.

## Leaves

- **C.1** OrgPath Codebook (UIAO_151)
- **C.2** Dynamic Group Library (UIAO_152)
- **C.3** Attribute Mapping Table (UIAO_153)
- **C.4** Delegation Matrix — AUs + Roles (UIAO_154)
- **C.5** Governance Workflow Catalog (UIAO_155)
- **C.6** Migration Runbook OU→Entra (UIAO_156)
- **C.7** JSON Schema (UIAO_158)
- **C.8** PowerShell Validation Module (UIAO_159)
- **C.9** Execution Substrate Integration (UIAO_164)
- **C.10** Identity Graph Normalization (UIAO_175)
- **C.11** Identity Risk Scoring (UIAO_170)

## Current pages

- Canon source: [modernization/orgtree.qmd](../../../modernization/orgtree.html)
- Codebook: [modernization/codebook.qmd](../../../modernization/codebook.html)
- Dynamic groups: [modernization/dynamic-groups.qmd](../../../modernization/dynamic-groups.html)
- Delegation: [modernization/delegation.qmd](../../../modernization/delegation.html)
